description: You are a Computer Systems Analyst for an e-commerce company. The nightly sales reporting pipeline at /home/ga/workspace/sales_pipeline/ has become unacceptably slow as data volume increased to 500K+ records. Optimize the pipeline by refactoring the five critical performance bottlenecks marked with '# PERFORMANCE NOTE' in the pipeline/*.py files. Use efficient pandas vectorization and Python best practices to improve performance. The optimized pipeline must produce identical output values and file formats as the original.
